description: A large solar farm's connection to the main grid is lost, but it continues to energize a section of the distribution network, creating a dangerous 'island'. The system must detect this and trip the solar farm offline.

nodes.task_description: Monitor voltage and frequency at the solar farm's point of interconnection using synchrophasor data.

expected_outcome.value: System is continuously monitoring grid conditions.

nodes.task_description: The system detects a phase angle shift and frequency deviation that are characteristic of an islanding condition.

expected_outcome.value: System's anti-islanding algorithm triggers an alarm.

nodes.task_description: Send a direct trip signal to the solar farm's protective relay to immediately de-energize it.

expected_outcome.value: System successfully trips the solar farm offline, eliminating the safety hazard.
